typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: ' DECLARE	@TransferITEMID TABLE( 	[ITEMID]	NVARCHAR(40)	NULL);  INSERT INTO @TransferITEMID( 	[ITEMID]) SELECT	[ITEMID] FROM	[dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTABLE_IDs]  	EXCEPT SELECT	[ITEMID] FROM	[ax].[INVENTTABLE];  SELECT	[a].[ITEMID], 	[a].[RECVERSION], 	[a].[PARTITION], 	[a].[DATAAREAID] FROM	@TransferITEMID [t] INNER JOIN [dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTABLE_IDs] [a] 	ON ([t].[ITEMID] = [a].[ITEMID])',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> StagingSource
StagingSource sink(input(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PARTITION as long,
		ITEMID as string,
		RECVERSION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		DATAAREAID,
		PARTITION,
		ITEMID,
		RECVERSION)) ~> RemoteProcessDatabaseDestination
